signals.headline: Bank of Korea Raises 2026 Inflation Forecast Above 2
signals.raw:
Bank of Korea Raises 2026 Inflation Forecast Above 2.2% Due to Middle East Oil Shock | YES | HIGH confidence**

The Bank of Korea confirmed on April 10, 2026, that South Korea's consumer price inflation will **significantly exceed its February forecast of 2.2%** due to surging global oil prices triggered by the Middle East conflict.[1][4] Governor Rhee Chang-yong stated that core inflation is also

signals.headline: 2026 World Cup Group Draw Confirmed: Switzerland in Group B with Canada, Qatar, Bosnia-Herzegovina** | YES | HIGH confid

2026 World Cup Group Draw Confirmed: Switzerland in Group B with Canada, Qatar, Bosnia-Herzegovina** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][3]
